title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple revealed a rebuilt Siri AI at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, and cross-device integration, but tied it to Google Gemini, delayed EU launch, and faced investor skepticism. The video questions whether Apple is advancing in AI or repackaging competitor technology.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 reveal of a rebuilt Siri that adds personal context, screen awareness, and cross-device integration, while running on Google Gemini. It matters because the Gemini dependency, a delayed EU launch, and investor skepticism raise the question of whether Apple is genuinely advancing in AI or repackaging a competitor's technology. The central takeaway is the tension between Siri's new capabilities and its reliance on outside models.
